title: Cathartocarpus bacillaris
taxonomy: Cathartocarpus bacillaris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Cathartocarpus and is native to tropical Africa. The exact classification and taxonomy of this plant are still being researched and refined. Further studies are needed to confirm its classification within the Fabaceae family. It is considered a rare and lesser-known species within the plant kingdom.
